author: han0110
content: It's a new release on upstream that cause Ere script fails, will update Ere tomorrow to fix that

author: han0110
content:
We can add support of single Ere server instance with multiple ELFs, but it'd require a starting cost when swapping ELF every time.

Sharing the same GPU for multiple Ere servers is doable for ZisK in theory, for other zkvVMs I'd need to check a bit.

author: chotuchaiwala
content: Are there any tests done around this cost? Also what's special about zisk that it allows for multiple ere servers, should be an interesting read.

author: han0110
content:
ZisK allows configure the amount of cuda stream to use, configuring it to smaller number would probably allow multiple prover sharing the same GPU (haven’t tested yet tho)

Other zkVMs might also support this kind of config to address GPU with smaller memory

author: han0110
content: Will try to measure the ELF setup cost and get back here

author: taulepton_
content: Are you sure we even want to spend time on this?

author: taulepton_
content: Because for real time proving we need multiple gpus anyway

author: han0110
content: Getting the ELF switching cost should be a quick task, but agree that for production usage we probably don’t want to share a GPU between provers
